promotions.title: Apolis - February 2026 Surplus Sale
content:
SUMMARY:

For the past few years this info does not get to the attentive team and we pay for about 40% more messages than we should due to Attentive messages not being accurate and causing customer confusion (very hard for us to retroactively request refund without hours of post mortem documentation)... We go on sale twice a year.. And the key change is it's a different website which is VERY confusing, but very helpful for our internal process / how we protect our brand and $ margin.. Really need attentive team to be equipped with FAQs attached and key details here:

APOLIS FULL PRICE SITE: apolisglobal.com

APOLIS SALE SITE: market.apolisglobal.com

WAITLIST -- SALE DETAILS -- February 28 (Open to public: 8am-8pm PST) -  https://apolisglobal.com/pages/surplus-market

Early Access: February 27 (8am pst)

KEY FAQs:
 ttps://market.apolisglobal.com/pages/help-center
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1pUOxXqPWjrw6WFQcsH1misziGFRRmbAcvSxMagydrvs/edit?tab=t.0

HISTORICAL: about 2,500 orders (ie: increase load of attentive support)

DELIVER TO CUSTOMERS:  March 30 - April 3

important: During the Surplus Market Sale for ANY customer that reaches out - ask them first if they're shopping the sale or if they're shopping on the  Apolis Global website
escalate: ESC if cx's have issues with VIP perks or if they weren't able to apply them to an order
For inquiries about new breeds added to the pet collection - use PCC shortcut and ESC once the customer responds
ESC if cx's ask if we sell detachable straps / straps sold separately
send_to_cs: Send to CS for shipping codes issues
templates: For issues regarding orders that end in S (e.g: 117670-S), use WTI shortcut
For inquiries regarding the letter limit use LTL shortcut
For event/group gifting, use EGG shortcut
When customers can't decide what they want, use ICD shortcut
During the Surplus Market sale, use the appropriate templates specific to this sale
dos_and_donts: For Ecomm (direct to customer) bulk orders, refer to this FAQ marketbag.apolisglobal.com
For individual orders refer to this FAQ: https://apolisglobal.com/pages/help-center-faq
Do not offer the CYpress Fig Personal Fragrance, it is no longer in stock.
For the Mercado Bag, customization is limited to 3 letters or characters only
If a cx asks about Surplus Sale pricing, let them know we no longer offer it
promo_and_exclusions: Discount codes don't work on market.apolisglobal.com. They only work on apolisglobal.com

promotions.title: Evergreen Discount
content: • Save up to 50%. See site for additional details.

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS
Send to CS for refund inquiries
tone: Close the convo once the client takes over
Close the convo if the cx first message is ok, no, etc.
Don't use the word "off" when talking about promotions
dos_and_donts: Don't proactively offer to find pricing info, redirect them to the website instead
promo_and_exclusions: Do not offer a coupon to first time purchasers/subscribers. There is not an active discount code at this time. Use DCI shortcut

promotions.title: TANGLE20
content: Applies to tangle free items. Only send to those asking about tangle free discount

promotions.title: GIFT
content: Applies to E-gift cards. Send to anyone who asks about holiday deals.

promotions.title: 11/27 Doorbuster - $19 Founder's Picks
content:
GOES LIVE AT 3AM EST ON 11/27

Applies to select styles. Available to everyone. This link has all the pairs on it that apply for the $19 promotion: 

https://shadyrays.com/collections/offers

Ends at 11:59pm PST

promotions.title: Promotions: AT20 and SHADE25
content:
NOT VALID DURING SITEWIDE SALES INCLUDING BLACK FRIDAY

• Send AT20 (20% off), if a customer asks for a discount, but specify that is only for their first order. 

→ If they are an existing customer, AT20 will not work. 

• Only send SHADE25 (25% off), if the cx has already used AT20

promotions.title: 11/28 Black Friday Doorbuster: 50% Off Colorush
content:

Applies to Colorush styles, 50% off. Available to everyone.

Ends 11:59pm PST

promotions.title: 11/30 Doorbuster: 50% Off Barstool
content:

Applies to 50% off Barstool Rival shades. Available to everyone.

promotions.title: New Years Sale
content:
STARTS AT 9AM EST

Applies to 30% off items, excludes accessories and mystery pairs. Can send to anyone as it is sitewide. Code will be auto-applied at checkout.

promotions.title: Cyber Monday
content:
GOES LIVE AT 3AM EST ON 12/1

• Up to 60% off sitewide. Applies to all customers.

• Includes: 
→ 30%: COLORUSH, S|R Fish, S|R Golf (and collabs), Green Wolf, Snow Goggles,  Prescription (frames and add-ons), Shirts, React Frames & Lenses

→ 40%: Pro, Tangle Free, Select Original Variants (Apex, Cayman, Mojave, Reign, Rival, Talon, Tangle Free Aston/Melrose/Oakmont, Titan), Kids/Youth, Barstool Rival

→ 60%: Original Variants (except exclusions listed above), Blue Light, Readers

promotions.title: End of Winter Sale
content: Applies sitewide, up to 40% off. Available to everyone. Excludes hard cases and mystery pairs. Snow is 30% off.

promotions.title: PD26
content: Applies to select shades items. Only send to those asking about presidents day sale. $20 off pairs. Excludes elite, snow.

promotions.title: GREEN35
content: Applies to green wolf items. Only send to those asking about green wolf.

tone: Close the convo if the cx first message doesn't warrant a response (e.g. Them thanking us, saying they're browsing, etc.)

For prescription orders questions use RPO shortcut
dos_and_donts: If customers want to return an item - clarify if they’re trying to return a recently purchased pair or if they need a replacement
